content.description: Structural editor for Hob JSON AST (Phase 2c: Structural Manipulation). Renders compact JSON AST as syntax-colored s-expressions with keyboard navigation, selection, delete, undo/redo, holes, input/string modes, and structural operations (move, wrap, unwrap, duplicate, slurp, barf, change type).

renderCollection.name: renderCollection
renderCollection.signature: (node, open, close, className, state, itemNames, api, indent)
